description: CISCE is the Council for the Indian School Certificate Examinations, an Indian education board that administers school examinations and related services. Its public web presence appears focused on informational content, results, affiliation, and user login portals for schools and candidates.
summary: No public developer integration surfaces were found for cisce.org or its official CISCE web properties; the site appears to provide informational pages and end-user portals rather than public APIs, GraphQL, MCP, or CLI tools.
